nasb.text: Sarah said, “God has made laughter for me; everyone who hears will laugh with me.”

esv.text: And Sarah said, “God has made laughter for me; everyone who hears will laugh over me.”

cnv.text: 撒拉說：“　神使我歡笑，凡聽見的，也必為我歡笑。”

ccb.text: 撒拉说：“上帝使我欢笑，凡听见这事的人也必跟我一同欢笑。

csbs.text: 撒拉说：“神使我欢笑，所有听见的人也必与我一同欢笑。”
